subcodes.title: Words to Will and Wendell Dodge, spoken on 1901-11-23
subcodes.first_line: A certain rich man came into the presence of Jesus Christ and said 'O Thou Spirit of God, I want to be one of thy disciples.'
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @stories; anecdotes, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
